unit_tests.output: No unit tests exist for API routes in this codebase

notes: All acceptance criteria met. POST /api/v1/ai/analyze-process: auth guard, workspace fetch (implicit RLS), 5-min rate limit (reads settings.last_analysis_at, returns 429 with retry_after_seconds), OPENROUTER_API_KEY check (503 if missing), parallel fetch of steps + sections, empty analysis short-circuit when no steps, prompt construction grouped by section with all metrics (name/status/executor/maturity/target/gap/time/frequency/effort/impact/type), OpenRouter call using native fetch() with deepseek/deepseek-chat-v3-0324 at temp 0.3 + max_tokens 4096 + json_object response_format, JSON parse with try/catch (502 on failure), workspace settings cache via spread (...settings) preserving existing keys, logActivity fire-and-forget (action: created, entity_type: ai_analysis). Client wrapper: analyzeProcess(workspaceId) using apiFetch<AIAnalysisResult>. Types: AIInsight + AIAnalysisResult added to database.ts. Zero new dependencies.
